rows.label: qev027102_MSG0020
rows.name:
Phew-! This morning's pizza was the best, jan!
With this, it feels like I can give my speeches
in perfect form all day today, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0021
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Hmm? Who are you, jan?
Did you come to support me, Adappin? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_JNK0010
rows.name: Propose[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_SEL0011
rows.name:
Show the secret medicine, claiming it is
the ultimate pizza seasoning.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_JNK0020
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell Adappin you have concerns
about his policies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0022
rows.name:
That looks kinda delicious, jan!
Go ahead, go ahead, sprinkle it on! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0023
rows.name:
This feels really good, jaaan!
Well then, thanks for the food! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0024
rows.name: Munch munch! Muuuunch!! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0025
rows.name:
Mmm! I don't feel like the taste has changed
much from usual, but— [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0026
rows.name:
Just like always, it's deliciooous!!
I'm super full and my motivation is maxed out, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0027
rows.name:
All right!
I'm gonna head over to the fountain on Melville Street East
and give a speech right now, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0028
rows.name:
See you later-!
If you're a supporter of mine, Adappin,
you should definitely come listen, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0029
rows.name:
Why?
Because if I, Adappin, join the provisional government, ne... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0030
rows.name: The salaries for you BLADEs will all be paid in pizza, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0031
rows.name:
It's super yummy, so what's the problem?
You Earthlings love pizza too, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0001
rows.name: Everyone, listen closely, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0002
rows.name:
Earthlings are fundamentally good guys, jan.
But sometimes, there are some among them who make fun of the Ma-non, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0003
rows.name:
If I, Adappin, join the provisional government,
I won't allow that to happen, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0004
rows.name:
As an equal member of the government, without being made a fool of,
I'll fiercely slam down the demands we Ma-non seek, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0005
rows.name:
The guys who don't understand the magnificence of pizza
will surely come out and say that pizza rations and pizza salaries
are unacceptable, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0006
rows.name: They'll tell me to immediately withdraw such policy proposals... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0007
rows.name:
But, I'll talk back to them like this, jan!
Of course, the answer is already decided, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0010
rows.name: Are the Ma-non making a mockery of the government?! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0012
rows.name: Were politics impossible for the Ma-non after all?! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0014
rows.name: It's complete nonsense to include pizza in a policy! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0015
rows.name: ............Yeees! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0017
rows.name:
The provisional government will surely bow down
before Adappin's completely unwavering demands, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0018
rows.name: ...Wait, huh? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027102_MSG0019
rows.name:
What's wrong with everyone, jan?
Why are you all making such awkward faces, jan? [ST:wait ]
